name: forge-golden-retrieval-v1
description: Golden retrieval set for the Forge Knowledge/RAG spine (plan Task 1.4). Each case pairs a query with the file path of the chunk a correct hybrid retrieval must surface. The corpus lives in forge_eval.retrieval_eval.SAMPLE_CORPUS. Queries deliberately mix natural-language semantic phrasing (exercises the pgvector leg) and exact identifiers (exercises the BM25 keyword leg) so the set proves hybrid retrieval, not one leg alone.
